crossTenantDenial.detail: The caller is not allowed to act in tenant scope tenant-acme.

api.description: Raw HTTP flow using the public API surface directly.
api.title: API example

sdk.description: TypeScript flow using the ergonomic checked-in CDNgine client surface.
sdk.title: SDK example

architectureComponents.label: API edge / auth
architectureComponents.responsibility: Authenticates the caller, enforces tenant and namespace scope, and emits request correlation.

architectureComponents.label: Registry metadata
architectureComponents.responsibility: Resolves immutable asset-version metadata, manifests, and delivery authorization context.

architectureComponents.label: tusd staging
architectureComponents.responsibility: Accepts resumable upload bytes before canonicalization turns them into durable source truth.

architectureComponents.label: Canonical source repository
architectureComponents.responsibility: Stores immutable source truth and reconstruction evidence for replay and source-export flows.

architectureComponents.label: Temporal workflow dispatch
architectureComponents.responsibility: Starts publication workflows and tracks long-running processing state.

architectureComponents.label: Worker hot cache
architectureComponents.responsibility: Accelerates repeated source reads close to compute during publication and replay.

architectureComponents.label: Derived hot origin
architectureComponents.responsibility: Stores current published derivatives and manifests for low-latency origin fetches.

architectureComponents.label: Cold origin media
architectureComponents.responsibility: Holds demoted derivative objects until a cold read triggers rehydration back into hot origin storage.

architectureComponents.label: Source export materialization
architectureComponents.responsibility: Materializes authorized original-source downloads from the canonical source plane.

architectureComponents.label: CDN edge
architectureComponents.responsibility: Serves hot derivatives directly and refills from origin on cache misses.

storageProfiles.description: Uses realistic hot and warm windows before lifecycle policy demotes the origin copy to cold media.
storageProfiles.label: Standard tiering

lifecycleTimeline.label: Upload bytes arrive in staging.
Canonical source snapshot completes.
Publication workflow is dispatched.
Deterministic derivative is published into hot origin storage.
First delivery warms the CDN edge cache.
Lifecycle policy demotes the origin copy to colder storage media.
Realistic restore makes a cold-read restore observable in the demo.
The CDN is refilled after rehydration and returns to hot service.

The CDN is refilled after rehydration and returns to hot service.

traces.summary: Upload lands in staging, canonicalizes into source truth, and publishes deterministic delivery outputs.
traces.title: Hero banner v1

events.action: Issue upload session, authenticate caller, and validate idempotency.
Receive resumable upload bytes in staging.
Snapshot immutable source bytes into the canonical repository.
Dispatch the publication workflow.
Read source data through the worker-side hot cache during processing.
Write deterministic derivatives and the manifest into hot origin storage.

traces.summary: Published derivative is still hot, so the CDN serves it directly after authorization and metadata lookup.
traces.title: Hero banner v1

events.action: Authorize delivery URL and enforce scope.
Resolve delivery metadata and manifest context.
Serve the derivative from the CDN edge cache.

traces.summary: The CDN misses, the hot origin copy has already been demoted, and the colder origin tier rehydrates the object before the edge is refilled.
traces.title: Hero banner v1

events.action: Authorize delivery URL and enforce scope.
Resolve immutable version metadata and derivative binding.
CDN edge misses because the hot window has expired.
Hot origin checks for the derivative and finds it demoted.
Realistic restore from colder origin media back into hot origin storage.
Refill the hot origin copy.
Refill the CDN edge and serve the request.

traces.summary: The authorized original-source download reconstructs from canonical truth and materializes a short-lived export.
traces.title: Hero banner v1

events.action: Authorize original-source access and enforce scope.
Resolve source-export authorization context.
Restore original bytes from the canonical source repository.
Materialize a short-lived export object.

storageProfiles.description: Compresses the hot and warm windows and makes cold restores nearly instant so the architecture can be demonstrated interactively.
storageProfiles.label: Accelerated cold demo
